pageIntro: Tenant cash registers: shift status, RKSV guidance for «Closed» status, decommissioning, and master data.

bulk.skippedCount: {{count}} register(s) skipped (open shift or already decommissioned).

shiftGuidance.pageCollapseTitle: Shift & RKSV: cash register status guide
shiftGuidance.closedSectionIntro: Closed means: no active shift and no ongoing sales on this register. This is normal outside business hours or between shifts.

closedReasons.endOfShift: End of shift: cashier or manager closed the register after business hours.
closedReasons.tagesabschluss: Daily closing (Z report): after the Z report the register is usually closed.
closedReasons.adminAction: Manually closed from the admin panel or on the device.
closedReasons.neverOpened: Newly created or never opened — waiting for the first shift.
closedReasons.decommissionPrep: Decommission preparation: the register must be closed before a Schlussbeleg can be created.

shiftGuidance.rksvRulesSectionTitle: RKSV rules for shifts and register status

schlussbeleg.description: Only for permanent decommission: a Schlussbeleg must be created before decommissioning. Not required for normal end-of-day closing.

tagesabschluss.description: At the end of each business day, create a daily closing (Z report) and close the register.

startbeleg.description: On first commissioning of a register (production TSE), a Startbeleg is required before sales are allowed.

reopenStartbeleg.description: No — reopening a closed register does not require a new Startbeleg. Startbeleg applies only to first commissioning.

singleCashier.description: A cashier cannot work on more than one open register at the same time. Close the first register before opening another.

shiftGuidance.statusTooltipClosed: Closed — no active shift. Open Details or expand the guide above.
shiftGuidance.detailContextNeverOpened: This register has not been commissioned yet. A Startbeleg is required before the first shift (production TSE). Then use «Open register» to start.
shiftGuidance.detailContextAfterShift: The last shift has ended. Open the register again for a new business day or shift — no new Startbeleg needed.
shiftGuidance.detailContextGeneric: The register has no active shift. Use «Actions → Open register» when operations should start.
shiftGuidance.detailOpenDescription: Active shift in progress. Sales are allowed. Close the register at end of shift or after daily closing (Z report).

openPrerequisites.startbelegFirstOpen: Startbeleg present (first commissioning only, production TSE)
openPrerequisites.monatsbelegProduction: Monatsbeleg for the current Vienna calendar month (production TSE)
openPrerequisites.singleCashier: Cashier must not have another open register

shiftGuidance.openActionTooltip: Open closed register: no new Startbeleg needed (only on first commissioning). Cashier may have only one open register.

dailyClosing.tooltip: Closed today — daily closing (Z report) or end-of-shift on the current Vienna day.

shiftChange.tooltip: Shift ended — cashier logged out; a new shift can be opened.

neverOpened.tooltip: Register not yet commissioned (Startbeleg / first shift pending).

licenseExpired.tooltip: Tenant or deployment license expired — register cannot be opened.

generic.tooltip: No active shift on this register.

decommission.warningNoPayments: The register cannot accept new payments afterwards
decommission.warningRetention: All receipts remain stored for 7 years
decommission.schlussbelegFlow: On confirm, an RKSV Schlussbeleg (Endbeleg) is created first; status is then set to Decommissioned automatically.
decommission.confirmCheckbox: I confirm that this register is being permanently decommissioned and can no longer be used for operation.
decommission.mustCloseFirst: The register must be closed (no open shift) before an Endbeleg can be created.
decommission.success: Schlussbeleg created — register decommissioned. No new payments allowed.
decommission.restoreTooltip: RKSV: decommissioning via Schlussbeleg is irreversible. Restore is not possible.

hardDelete.body: Deletes the row only when no payment/receipt data exists. Not a substitute for RKSV decommissioning.

moduleUnavailable: Cash register management is currently unavailable
moduleUnavailableDescription: No valid license is configured for your tenant or access is locked. Please contact your administrator.
emptyCanCreate: No cash registers yet. Click «New register» to create one.
emptyContactAdmin: No cash registers yet. Please contact your administrator.

adminPage.title: Cash registers (tenant)
adminPage.intro: Super Admin: pick a tenant and manage its cash registers.
adminPage.selectTenantHint: Select a tenant to load the cash register list.
adminPage.managerIntro: Pick a register to open cash register management for your tenant.

selector.label: Register
selector.autoSelectedHint: This register was selected automatically (only available register).
